column1: # Literature basis: Portland cement isothermal calorimetry. C3S main
# hydration peak near 8-12 h (heat flow mW/g); C2S contributes slowly after
# ~24 h. Cumulative heat saturates ~300-350 J/g by 7 d. Ca(OH)2 grows
# stepwise with C3S hydration. Values synthetic but follow the real curve
# shape (induction -> acceleration -> deceleration -> slow C2S tail).
